title: selaginella microphylla
intro: Selaginella microphylla, also known as spikemoss, is a type of ancient, air-breathing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its small, scale-like leaves and ability to thrive in humid environments. Traditionally, Selaginella microphylla has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant's medicinal properties have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella microphylla can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
